texto: We are all the authors of our own fates
autor: but we have gotten so lost in the technicalities of forming letters and stringing words together that we've forgotten what it really means to write.
explicacao: Citação de but we have gotten so lost in the technicalities of forming letters and stringing words together that we've forgotten what it really means to write. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “We are all the authors of our own fates” articula reflexao, cristen-rodgers, authors em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
